text.title: Multi-Region Active-Active Pattern Procedure
text.summary: 6-step procedure to apply multi-region-active-active-pattern. Each step names its input, action, and output. Steps may not be reordered without explicit deviation note.

step.name: Select regions
step.description: Input: SLA + residency + latency map. Action: Pick 2-3 regions; document constraints.. Output: Region selection..
step.note: Step 1. Required input: SLA + residency + latency map.

step.name: Data model + consistency
step.description: Input: Region selection. Action: Per data class: required consistency + acceptable lag.. Output: Consistency spec..

step.name: Conflict policy
step.description: Input: Consistency spec. Action: Per data class: explicit conflict rule.. Output: Conflict policy..

step.name: Edge steering
step.description: Input: Region selection. Action: Residency-aware traffic steering rules.. Output: Steering config..

step.name: Drill cadence
step.description: Input: All above. Action: Schedule quarterly drills; assign owner.. Output: Drill calendar..

step.name: Continuous SLI
step.description: Input: Live system. Action: Replication-lag SLI + alerts.. Output: Active-active SLO panel..
